title: Selling Ebooks Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Selling ebooks online without Stripe or PayPal is a reality for creators in restricted countries, but finding a reliable alternative can be a daunting task. Many digital sellers in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, and other restricted countries have been blocked by PayPal, leaving them with limited options for collecting payments from their customers. As a result, they're forced to look for alternative solutions that can help them monetize their digital products without the hassles of Stripe or PayPal. But what are these options, and which one is the most suitable for your needs?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, Payhip, and other platforms might seem like viable alternatives to Stripe or PayPal, but they often come with their own set of limitations and restrictions. For instance, Gumroad has a blocked countries list, which includes several countries where you might have a significant following. Payhip, on the other hand, has a limited range of payment options and can be quite expensive for creators who sell high-ticket digital products. In contrast, NOWPayments, a payment processor integrated with Unchained Commerce, offers a seamless payment experience for creators without the need for Stripe or PayPal accounts. With NOWPayments, you can accept payments in 300+ cryptocurrencies, making it an ideal choice for creators who want to expand their reach beyond traditional payment methods.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Stripe and PayPal's restrictions on certain countries can be frustrating for creators who want to reach a global audience. But Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a permanent structural alternative that bypasses these restrictions altogether. With NOWPayments as your payment processor, you can sell ebooks and other digital products to customers in restricted countries without worrying about any limitations. This is because NOWPayments doesn't require KYC, making it a more accessible option for creators who want to expand their customer base.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speeds, fees, and real costs, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle stands out from the competition. With NOWPayments, you can expect instant automated delivery of your ebooks and other digital products, making it ideal for creators who want to provide a seamless experience for their customers. Additionally, NOWPayments' fees are competitive, and you won't have to worry about any hidden charges or surprise fees. This means that you can keep more of the revenue from your sales, which is essential for sustainable growth and success as a creator.
NOWPayments is the only payment processor that doesn't require KYC, making it ideal for creators who want to sell ebooks to customers in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are critical components of any ecommerce platform, and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle has got you covered. With the Core Engine, you can automate delivery of your ebooks and other digital products, ensuring that your customers receive their purchases promptly. The Web3 Wallet Connect feature also allows for seamless wallet integration, making it easy for customers to complete their purchases. Plus, the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, giving you complete control over your store's performance.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When it comes to choosing the right platform for selling ebooks online without Stripe or PayPal, it's essential to consider your specific needs and requirements. If you're looking for a reliable, KYC-free payment processor that can help you reach a global audience, NOWPayments is an excellent choice. If you need a comprehensive ecommerce solution that includes automation and delivery capabilities, the Full Stack Bundle is the way to go. By choosing the right platform for your situation, you can ensure that your customers receive a seamless experience and that you can focus on creating more value for your audience.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers instant automated delivery, making it the perfect choice for creators who want to provide a seamless experience for their customers.

Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
